zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD维持窄幅震荡结构，价格贴近74关口运行，多空力量暂时均衡偏多短线仍以整理蓄势为主上行动能缓慢累积但未有效突破结构偏稳

MACD指标维持正值且动能柱稳定，显示短期多头占优；均线系统中SMA20与现价几乎重合缺乏明显趋势延伸进入盘整过渡阶段内短期偏强震荡

下方支撑集中在73.60附近及73.30区域，上方阻力位于74.20至74.40一带突破需成交量配合确认否则仍以区间波动为主

短线策略以区间交易为主，高抛低吸更为适用，若放量突破74.3则可顺势跟随并关注回踩确认机会控制风险避免追高保持纪律交易

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is currently trading around 74.09 against the US dollar, showing a very tight intraday range between 73.62 and 74.11. Price action suggests a consolidation phase after a mild upward drift, with buyers repeatedly defending the 73.6 area. Overall momentum is neutral-to-slightly bullish, as the market holds just above short-term equilibrium levels, indicating balance between supply and demand in the current session.

Momentum indicators show a mixed but constructive setup. The MACD reading at 0.6321 remains in positive territory, suggesting underlying bullish pressure, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation strength. RSI(14) is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold clarity. Price is hovering almost exactly at the SMA(20) near 74.084, reinforcing a short-term equilibrium and signaling a potential breakout compression phase in the current structure.

Immediate support is forming at 73.62, which aligns with the recent session low and serves as the first defensive zone for buyers. Below that, 73.00 acts as a psychological buffer. On the upside, resistance is located at 74.11, the intraday high, followed by a potential extension toward 74.50 and 75.00 if momentum expands. The tight range indicates a coiling structure preparing for a directional move.

Given the current structure, short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near 73.6 support and taking partial profits near 74.1 resistance. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close above 74.11 to target 74.5 and 75. Conversely, a breakdown below 73.6 could trigger downside continuation toward 73.0. Risk management remains critical due to low volatility and potential false breakouts in this compressed zone.
